entry.content:

entry.title: 347. Top K Frequent Elements
entry.content:
LeetCode

HashMap + Heap, Time complexity: O(Nlogk)

entry.title: 692. Top K Frequent Words
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach #1: Sorting [Accepted], Time Complexity: O(NlogN)

Approach #2: Heap [Accepted], Time Complexity: O(Nlogk)

entry.title: amazon road construction mst
Amazon components assembly
50. Pow(x, n)
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute Force, Time complexity: O(n), Time Limit Exceeded

Approach 2: Fast Power Algorithm Recursive, Time complexity: O(logn)

Approach 3: Fast Power Algorithm Iterative, Time complexity: O(logn), Space complexity: O(1)

entry.title: 49. Group Anagrams
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Categorize by Sorted String, Time Complexity: O(NKlogK)

Approach 2: Categorize by Count, Time Complexity: O(NK)

entry.title: 48. Rotate Image
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach : Transpose and then reverse
